evidence_facets.name: prod_retrieval
evidence_facets.query: Built and deployed embeddings-based retrieval or semantic search systems to real users in production, handling embedding drift and retrieval-quality regression

evidence_facets.name: vector_infra
evidence_facets.query: Operated vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure such as FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, OpenSearch or Elasticsearch in production

evidence_facets.name: ranking_eval
evidence_facets.query: Designed evaluation frameworks for ranking systems using NDCG, MRR, MAP, A/B testing and offline-to-online correlation

evidence_facets.name: shipped_scale
evidence_facets.query: Shipped an end-to-end ranking, search or recommendation system serving real users at large scale

evidence_facets.name: llm_finetuning
evidence_facets.query: Fine-tuned large language models using LoRA, QLoRA or PEFT for a production use case

evidence_facets.name: distributed_infra
evidence_facets.query: Built distributed systems or optimized large-scale model inference and serving

negative_facets.name: marketing_content
negative_facets.query: Wrote marketing content, SEO articles, blog posts or managed social media and campaigns

negative_facets.name: pure_research
negative_facets.query: Academic research and publishing papers in a lab with no production deployment

negative_facets.name: framework_tutorials
negative_facets.query: Built demos and tutorials wiring LangChain to the OpenAI API for a side project

negative_facets.name: generic_admin
negative_facets.query: Managed people, operations, sales, accounting or customer support processes
